heading: Role of the Secretary of State in foreign policy guidance
label: 6209b Role of the Secretary of State in foreign policy guidance
text: To assist the Agency in carrying out its functions, the Chief Executive Officer shall regularly consult with and seek from the Secretary of State guidance on foreign policy issues.
notes: Codification, , , which amended this section, was itself amended by , , , to make it effective 90 days after .
